headline: Inside ‘Project Eagle,’ JPMorgan’s High-Wire Act to Fund EA Deal
summary: (Bloomberg) -- The post from @realDonaldTrump landed at precisely 7:23 a.m. Inside JPMorgan Chase & Co., the final piece of Project Eagle was a go.For weeks, JPMorgan bankers had anxiously watched events in the Middle East as they worked to sell the financing for the biggest leveraged buyout ever, the $55-billion private equity takeover of video-game giant Electronic Arts Inc. headline: SpaceX Could Open 30% of Its IPO to Retail Investors. Here’s How You Can Buy It
summary: Elon Musk is reportedly preparing his aerospace company, SpaceX, for an initial public offering (IPO) that could allocate up to 30% of its shares to retail investors. The proposed structure would deviate from traditional IPO allocations, where institutional investors typically receive most of the shares in the initial offering before others can buy in. headline: How The S&P Global (SPGI) Narrative Is Shifting With Issuance, AI And Valuation Revisions
summary: S&P Global’s fair value estimate has been nudged higher from US$537.90 to US$538.52, a tiny move that still signals fresh thinking about where the stock might sit long term. Recent research shows analysts reworking their price targets in both directions as they weigh issuance trends, information services growth, and new questions around competition and AI. Read on to see what is driving these shifting views and how you can track the evolving S&P Global story. Analyst Price Targets don't...

headline: Morgan Stanley’s Bitcoin ETF Push Recasts Its Digital Asset Ambitions
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has officially launched its own Bitcoin ETF, expanding its presence in digital assets. The bank is pursuing additional cryptocurrency ETFs through new regulatory filings. It is forming technology partnerships to enable crypto trading and plans to support tokenized equities for clients. Leadership appointments are being made to build out the firm’s broader digital asset business. Morgan Stanley, trading around $158.39, is at the center of a major shift as more...

headline: Morgan Stanley Nears Bitcoin ETF Launch With Fee Below BlackRock
summary: Morgan Stanley is preparing to launch a spot Bitcoin ETF with a 0.14% fee, which would be the lowest in the US market.

headline: Morgan Stanley files for cheapest Bitcoin ETF
summary: Morgan Stanley is launching a Bitcoin ETF with a fee lower than its major competitors. In a filing with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) on Friday, the bank set the cost for its upcoming spot Bitcoin ETF at just 14 basis points (0.14%). This move could start a new price ...

headline: How The Standard Chartered (LSE:STAN) Story Is Shifting As Analyst Targets Converge
summary: Standard Chartered’s central fair value estimate is now set at £19.25 versus £18.94 previously, with fresh analyst price targets clustering between £18.65 and £22.00 around that mark. Taken together, the lifts to £17.75, £18.30 and £22.00, alongside the trim to £18.65 from £21.22, show that recent research is constructive overall but not unanimous on how much upside the shares might justify. As you read on, you will see how to interpret these shifting targets and track the evolving story...
